howItWorks.outro: Tax laws and financial markets change frequently. Verify current rates with your financial institution.

faq.a: Interest earned on both your principal and previously earned interest - growth accelerates over time.
S&P 500 has averaged ~10% annually, ~7% after inflation over the long term.
